drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Makes environmental test chambers for aerospace, defense, automotive, electronics, EV, and solar industries. No UXV-specific product line; drone/UAV/UAS are never mentioned anywhere in the corpus.

readiness.notes: Offers a full standard product catalog with multiple product families advertised for serial delivery.

unresolved_questions: No drone/UAV/UAS references found anywhere in the corpus — vendor appears to be a broad industrial test equipment manufacturer with no UXV-specific products.
tagline: Manufactures MIL-STD-810 compliant environmental test chambers (altitude, thermal shock, salt spray, dust, rain, battery-rated) and combined mechanical-thermal systems for defense, aerospace, EV, and electronics qualification. Bangalore-based; production-ready. NDAA and Blue UAS status unknown. Public evidence sparse on US defense contracts or certifications; claims IoT/AI capabilities (enviCoM® 4.0) but independent verification limited.
